expectations.text: Distinguishes `absent()` (entire job missing from scrape) from `up == 0` (exporter reachable but service down) as detecting different failure modes
expectations.evidence: 'absent() fires when the entire job disappears from Prometheus scrape targets... up == 0 fires when Prometheus can reach the target config but the actual scrape fails.'
